rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ARNOLD S GRIDLEY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Michael Gridley'S First Set Of Post-Judgment Discovery
rulings.Rulings: The motion is granted, no opposition having been filed. Patricia must fully respond to the Judgment Creditors¿ First Sets of Post-Judgment Special Interrogatories and Requests for Production of Documents within 10 days, and she must pay sanctions in the amount of $1350. Any party requesting to argue the tentative must call the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel no later than 5:00 p.m. on 12/20/11.
